strong_qualifications: 7 years professional experience — well above typical senior threshold
Expert-level Python and JavaScript — directly matches core technical requirement
Microservices redesign at scale (2M DAU) — strong system design evidence

Formal people-management — implied but not explicitly stated
potential_concerns: AWS only — GCP/Azure not mentioned. Interview verification recommended.
Leadership claims informal — confirm scope of mentorship at interview.
human_review_flags: Borderline: Cloud/DevOps is Adequate, not Strong — may need second look if role is cloud-heavy.
